app.name: Plane
app.one_liner: Modern open-source project management platform for tracking issues, running cycles, and managing roadmaps.

screens.name: Cycle Planner
screens.purpose: Plan and manage time-boxed work cycles with automated or manual issue assignment.

screens.name: Issue Detail View
screens.purpose: Display and edit detailed information about a specific work item including description, assignee, status, and comments.

screens.name: Workspace Dashboard
screens.purpose: Central hub for viewing and managing projects, cycles, issues, and team activity.

rust_commands.name: assign_issue
rust_commands.purpose: Assign an issue to a team member and trigger notification delivery.

rust_commands.name: create_cycle
rust_commands.purpose: Create a new time-bound cycle and optionally auto-populate with issues based on filters.

rust_commands.name: save_issue
rust_commands.purpose: Persist an issue with its metadata including title, description, assignee, and status.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build basic workspace dashboard UI
week 1: Implement core issue CRUD operations
week 1: Set up user authentication and project scoping
week 2: Add cycle creation and management
week 2: Design database schema for issues and cycles
week 2: Implement issue assignment with notification stub
week 3: Add validation for webhook IP addresses
week 3: Implement SSRF and IDOR mitigations from v1.2.2
week 3: Integrate real-time updates for issue changes
acceptance_tests: After upgrading Plane, the application does not abort unexpectedly during normal operation.
Automated cycle generation creates cycles with appropriate default issues based on project filters.
Self-hosted GitLab integration in Pro version correctly authenticates and syncs issues without failure.
When a work item is assigned to a user, they receive a notification via the configured channel.
